reading.title: Reading: A birthday invitation
reading.passage: My birthday is on the first of June this year. The party is on the third of June, a Saturday. It is my twentieth birthday, so it is a special one.

questions.question: The birthday is on the first of June.
questions.explanation: "My birthday is on the first of June".

reading.title: Reading: Review — A helpful colleague
reading.passage: Can you help me? I can fill in this form, but I can't sign it correctly. The meeting is on the second of May. This is my pen, and these are my forms. They are small but useful.

questions.question: The writer can sign the form correctly.
When is the meeting?
questions.explanation: "The meeting is on the second of May."
